title: Theory Admission Gate
status: Promoted formal paper with executable theory-admission receipt
block_title: Time, Receipts, Admission, Physics Interfaces, and Continuum Edges
central_thesis: Prove the T10-anchored admission Gluon as a Gluon mass filter at K=9, with Pariah/Happy-Family closure carried as a local Lattice Forge boundary receipt.

claims.primary_content: T_ADMISSION admits a candidate only when T10 signs the context, the candidate mass matches the trusted spectrum, and the mass is inside K_max=9; otherwise the candidate becomes a boundary or rejected datum receipt.
claims.required_action: Extend candidate-specific Gluon mass functions as new admitted theory families are promoted.

math.primary_content: A(T) = signed_T10(T) and m(T) in S_T10 and m(T) <= 9, with exhaustive admitted, boundary, and rejected/rejected_as_datum outlets.
math.required_action: Bind future candidate theories to explicit m(T) definitions before admission.

formal_algebra_calculus.primary_content: Normal receipt form: (candidate_id, mass, trusted_match, K_max, T10_anchor, verdict). Closed gate: accepted iff signed_T10 and spectrum_match and K <= 9.
formal_algebra_calculus.required_action: Promote any later recentering into an explicit handoff equation from C00/E00_to_1.

hand_work.primary_content: By-hand reconstruction validates the center, T10 anchor, trusted spectrum, K=9 boundary, and first outlet reached by the candidate.
hand_work.required_action: Keep workbook material proof-facing without letting it obscure the theorem.

code_rebuild.primary_content: Run python production/formal-papers/CQE-paper-11/verify_theory_admission_gate.py to emit the theory admission gate receipt.
code_rebuild.required_action: Add candidate-specific adapters as new theory families are admitted.

lib_bindings.primary_content: T_ADMISSION; CMPLX-Kernel/lib-forge part1_constants.py and part2_steps.py; lattice_forge.ledger.build_seed_database for local Monster/Pariah ledger routes.
lib_bindings.required_action: Promote individual Happy-Family ledger nodes if finer-grained receipts require them.

tests_and_receipts.primary_content: Verifier checks T10 lineage, trusted spectrum, K=9, admitted/boundary/rejected mass-gate outlets, local Pariah objects/routes, and Pariah/Happy boundary signatures; hidden-guess ablation remains required for training-mode diagnostics.
tests_and_receipts.required_action: Add hidden-guess training wrappers around future candidate admission diagnostics.

deployment_kernel.primary_content: Deployable individually as CQE-paper-11 and selectable through the master suite using the promoted verifier and receipt.
deployment_kernel.required_action: Expose the verifier through the master suite selector without duplicate routing logic.
